title: Good ol' commands
description: A simple mod to bring back the commands everyone used but everyone lost in the recent updates.
body:
Good ol' commands adds and will add as much old commands as possible. Currently, you can use :
- /gm 0 (survival mode)
- /gm 1 (creative mode)
- /gm 2 (adventure mode)
- /gm 3 (spectator mode)

More commands and functionalities will be added, such as :
- ~~Sound indicator when gamemode is changed~~ (Done!)
- More variants to the existing commands
- More commands
- Much more!

Enjoy :)
